description.unified: Deals Physical DMG to enemies in a frontal area and stuns them for [1 sec->0.6sec]. This attack is guaranteed to Crit.
Removes negative effects from [self and an ally->self and 3allies] with the highest ATK, and grants [Assault] for [20 sec->10sec]. [Assault]: Increases ATK by 15% of Priscilla’s ATK + {0}.
Deals Physical DMG to enemies in a circular area and pulls them toward self. If under [Assault], increases P.DMG taken by [30%->40%] for 10sec. [M.DMG (removed)].
Increases ATK by {0} and DEF Penetration by [100->160].

light.unified: Increases Mana Cost by 1000, but increases duration by 5 sec.

dark.unified: While in [Assault], on Normal Attack, increases the target’s DMG taken by [30% (all sources)->25%] for 1 sec.

description.unified: [Vital Strike] Increases DMG by 50%, and for 10 sec, reduces the target's P.Block Chance by {0}.
[Coordination] Increases ATK Boost by {0}% and reduces skill cooldown of the ally with the highest ATK by [30%->20%].
[Turbulent Dance] Increases DMG by {0}% and Stuns the target for [3 sec->1.8 sec].
[Weapon Mastery] Increases ATK Boost by 50% and increases own [All DEF->P.DEF] by {0}%.

dark.unified: Increases all allies’ Attack by 3% of your Attack, and increases all allies’ Physical Defense by 3% of your Physical Defense.

description.unified: Upon hitting enemies with a Skill, reduces the Cooldown of the used Skill by {0} sec per enemy hit, and increases ATK Spd by [50->2%] for 5 sec. ATK Spd increase stacks up to 10 times.

Summons the Soul of Tumultuous Dance, Excilius for 12sec, increasing ATK of self and [the ally->3allies] with the highest ATK by [40%->20%], and Crit DMG by [40%->32%]. The [ally->3allies] with the highest ATK additionally gain immunity to CC for [???->5sec].

1.from: Reduces Skill Activation requirements by 4 sec.
1.to: Reduces Skill Activation Requirements by 4 sec.
1.unified: Reduces Skill Activation Requirements by 4 sec.

2.from: For the duration of Skill, increases DMG dealt by the ally with the highest ATK by 30%.
2.to: For the duration, increases DMG dealt by 3allies with the highest ATK by 14%.
2.unified: For the duration, increases DMG dealt by [the ally->3allies] with the highest ATK by [30%->14%].
